sources.name: Criteo Attribution Dataset
sources.intendedUse: temporal click and attribution modeling; not intentional-fraud labels
sources.schema: click/conversion attribution logs
sources.boundedUse: streamed sample for temporal baselines and simulation priors
sources.reason: metadata-only or unavailable bounded direct download

sources.name: CriteoPrivateAd
sources.intendedUse: privacy-limited bidding, landed-click, delayed-reporting and benign auction baselines
sources.schema: real-world bidding outcomes with delayed reporting scenarios
sources.reason: metadata-only or unavailable bounded direct download

sources.name: Criteo Click Logs
sources.intendedUse: normal click/impression baseline; CTR is not a fraud label
sources.schema: bounded click-log sample
sources.boundedUse: 1-5M streamed rows in non-quick experiments; no full 276GB download in repo workflow
sources.reason: metadata-only or unavailable bounded direct download

sources.name: TalkingData AdTracking Fraud Detection Challenge
sources.intendedUse: weak attribution-quality supervision only when credentials already exist
sources.schema: mobile click attribution
sources.reason: credentials and terms were not already available in environment

sources.name: Criteo Uplift Dataset
sources.intendedUse: uplift and incrementality baselines so conversion is not over-trusted
sources.schema: treatment, exposure, visit and conversion indicators
sources.reason: metadata-only or unavailable bounded direct download

sources.name: Avazu CTR Prediction
sources.intendedUse: chronological mobile ad click logs for normal-background and rare-context baselines
sources.schema: ad id, device/app/site/context categorical fields and click feedback
sources.reason: credentials and terms were not already available in environment

sources.name: KDD Cup 2012 Track 2 Tencent sponsored-search CTR
sources.intendedUse: sponsored-search click-through baselines and query/ad/user context hard negatives
sources.schema: Tencent search advertising session instances with click feedback
sources.reason: credentials and terms were not already available in environment

sources.name: iPinYou Global RTB Bidding Algorithm Competition Dataset

sources.name: Ali-CCP Alibaba Click and Conversion Prediction Dataset
sources.intendedUse: post-click conversion baselines and click/conversion sparsity hard negatives

sources.name: Controlled bot laboratory
sources.intendedUse: fixed-rate, randomized-rate, headed/headless, replayed-trace and valid-cookie bots against owned test surfaces
sources.schema: generated event stream with known mutation labels
sources.reason: controlled deterministic scenarios are generated by the pipeline

sources.name: Controlled event-spoofing laboratory
sources.intendedUse: invalid HMAC, missing signature, unknown click/impression, mismatched campaign/device and replayed postback mutations
sources.schema: generated event stream with exact mutation labels
sources.reason: controlled deterministic scenarios are generated by the pipeline

sources.name: Controlled motivated traffic study
sources.license: generated by project unless replaced by consented study data

sources.schema: generated or consented events with retention, value, refund and uninstall outcomes
sources.reason: controlled deterministic scenarios are generated by the pipeline

sources.name: Controlled human click-farm simulation
sources.license: generated by project unless replaced by consented study data

sources.name: User-supplied first-party labelled ad traffic
sources.license: user supplied; must be authorized for model training
sources.intendedUse: analyst-reviewed production labels, appeal outcomes, refunds, chargebacks, MMP postbacks and known-good traffic
sources.schema: JSONL or CSV canonical event rows with label_* columns or a labels array
sources.reason: place authorized JSONL/CSV labels at data/first-party-ad-fraud-labels.jsonl or pass --first-party-labels
